title: Homepage | Faculty of Fine Arts and Design
content:
Dean’s Message

The Faculty of Arts and Design accepts students into the departments of Graphic Design, Visual Communication Design, Interior Architecture, Industrial Design, Textile and Fashion Design, Gastronomy and Culinary Arts, Acting, and Digital Game Design.

With all of its departments, our faculty aims to raise individuals who are creative and productive, and sensitive to the society they live in and who follow and use new technologies, create works of art and design on an international scale and make a
    difference.

The structure of the Faculty of Arts and Design, which includes different programs, offers opportunities for both students and faculty members to conduct interdisciplinary studies. With national and international exhibitions, workshops, film screenings,
    conferences and symposiums organized by our faculty, educational processes are supported on the one hand, and on the other hand, contributions are made to the society through art.

Prof. Dr. Kamil USLU

Dean
